action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with empty workspace. Need to first verify MuJoCo/HumanoidBench installation works with a quick test. Analysis: Will create a minimal script to instantiate one environment, take a few random steps, and verify shapes/rewards work correctly. This avoids spending iterations debugging basic setup. Decision: Create test_env.py to verify gym.make('h1hand-walk-v0') works.
